schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Skiing Course” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Tourism Development Board under the Department of Tourism, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote skiing among the youth of the state by providing professional training, enabling participants to become proficient skiers, competitive athletes, or certified skiing instructors.
schemeContent.benefits_md: The beneficiary will become a skiing trainer or competitor, upon completing the course.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote skiing among the youth of the state by providing professional training, enabling participants to become proficient skiers, competitive athletes, or certified skiing instructors.

children.text: The scheme “Skiing Course” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Tourism Development Board under the Department of Tourism, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote skiing among the youth of the state by providing professional training, enabling participants to become proficient skiers, competitive athletes, or certified skiing instructors.
The beneficiary will become a skiing trainer or competitor, upon completing the course.
Applicants must complete the prescribed application form and submit it along with the required documents to the office of the District Tourism Development Officer.
Upon completion of the tests, the District Tourism Development Officer will forward the list of shortlisted candidates to the headquarters.
Final selection of participants will be made by a committee constituted at the headquarters.

applicationProcess.process_md: - Applicants must complete the prescribed application form and submit it along with the required documents to the office of the District Tourism Development Officer. - Upon completion of the tests, the District Tourism Development Officer will forward the list of shortlisted candidates to the headquarters. - Final selection of participants will be made by a committee constituted at the headquarters.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a youth from Uttarakhand. 1. The applicant must be between 18 and 25 years of age. 1. The applicant will be considered on a first-come, first-served basis. > The total number of 40 beneficiaries will be selected.

children.text: The applicant must be a youth from Uttarakhand.
The applicant must be between 18 and 25 years of age.
The applicant will be considered on a first-come, first-served basis.
The total number of 40 beneficiaries will be selected.
